microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation **program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing end-to-end project methodology to sustain 45+ annual drills and deliver **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining functional requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Defined program roadmaps and managed the **full initiative lifecycle** for Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program, delivering in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate and surfacing critical hardware defects across store-scale infrastructure.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating stakeholder alignment across competing organizational goals.

Built and maintained program documentation — charters, risk logs, milestones, and dependency maps — across all active drill initiatives, ensuring on-time, on-budget delivery with clear scope change management procedures for senior stakeholders.

Scaled team leverage via an **AI-driven planning agent**, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, establishing a new model for continuous, data-informed program execution.
microsoft_2023: Championed **program adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly across Azure service organizations.

Translated stakeholder needs into functional requirements by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams, influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation and close critical feature gaps.

Improved **data integrity and retrieval** by defining metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting average lookup time by 83% and reducing friction for cross-functional technical teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating across 140+ teams with competing milestones and ambiguous scope.

Mobilized a program strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact critical paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and process gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation investments and prioritize high-impact improvements across the DTC launch pipeline.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating stakeholder alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to keep the migration program on schedule and within scope.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing repeatable release processes for retail-scale hardware fleets.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM workflow that standardized operations and improved consumer-facing turnaround times.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to drive incremental DTC channel performance.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering actionable recommendations that directly shaped store operations policy.
